title: ehrharta erecta
intro: Ehrharta erecta, also known as Native Pampas Grass or Pampas Grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from rheumatism. The herbal preparations of Ehrharta erecta typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to make teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
